case_title: HARRY ROSS VS. SHAWN M RICHARD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-14-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY-14-17 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HARRY ROSS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAWN RICHARD IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY ROSS, HARRY AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARD, SHAWN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED SEP-10-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARD, SHAWN M
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSS, HARRY
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
EXHIBITS FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE RECEIVED AT WINDOW HEARING SET FOR MAY 14, 2018 @ 3:30PM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSS, HARRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2018 BY NEWTON LAM. PLAINTIFF HARRY ROSS IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES HAD REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING, HOWEVER, DEFENDANT HAS BREACHED THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND HAS HAD NO CONTACT WITH PLAINTIFF NOR HAS HONORED ANY PORTION OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSS, HARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARD, SHAWN M $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,710.00, TO REIMBURSE MONIES FOR INSTALLATION OF A SOUND SYSTEM ON HIS MOTORCYCLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 05/15/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, REGARDING RETURN (TWICE) OF VEST AND 'NOTICE OF TELEPHONIC COURT APPEARANCE' FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSS, HARRY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - SHAWN M RICHARD; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSS, HARRY
